disclosure_items.clinical_fact: At this moment the patient is alert and oriented, reports no aura, and has no twitching, jerking, or loss of awareness — they describe feeling at their normal baseline
trigger_question_examples: Are you having any jerking, twitching, or a seizure right now?
Do you feel like your normal self at the moment?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not twitching or jerking. I feel like my normal self right now — I'm just terrified about what happens if I don't get my tablet.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The unavailable medication is a critical daily seizure-prevention tablet (sodium valproate 500 mg twice daily) and the evening dose is now due or overdue
trigger_question_examples: What medication is it and how do you normally take it?
When was your last dose and when is the next one due?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's my sodium valproate, 500 milligrams, one in the morning and one at night. My night one is due right now and I don't have any with me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The patient reports that a previously missed dose once led to a severe, prolonged seizure that required hospital care
trigger_question_examples: Has missing a dose ever caused a problem for you before?
What happens to you if you miss a dose?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — the one time I missed a dose I had a massive seizure that wouldn't stop and I ended up in hospital. That's why I'm so scared.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: There is no supply of the medication available at all tonight — the whole supply was left at home interstate and there is none in the luggage, in an unfamiliar location
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any of the tablets with you at all?
Is there any way to get to your usual supply tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: None at all — I left the entire lot at home in another state. We've searched all the bags. I don't know this area either.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: On direct screening the patient denies any current jerking, loss of consciousness, confusion, repeated seizures, or failure to return to normal awareness
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any seizure, blackout, or confusion in the last little while?
Any repeated seizures or times you didn't fully wake up in between?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing like that — no seizure, no blackout, no confusion. I'm completely aware, I'm just frightened it's coming.
